value.0: Decorated in ivy patterns, this ornate gate rises from a slot in the floor below.

Named for the creatures most closely associated with beauty, Nymph Cloaks are popular fodder for tavern tales among the common folk. The story usually involves some hapless noble couple spending a fortune on one or more such items so they can stand to look at one another. It always gets a big laugh among a copper-ale crowd, though most professional bards consider such pandering a tool of the unskilled.

Having explored the northlands extensively, a druid named Aawill commissioned the creation of these comfortable boots. Knowing he was heading for the sometimes-dangerous domain of the Neverwinter Woods, Aawill was looking for something helpful in combat, to lighten his need for armor. Since becoming the Archdruid for the Neverwinter Wood's Druid Grove, Aawill has commissioned several, more powerful versions of his original boots.

Harp of the Angel's Heart is an instrument that only the best minstrels can use to its full potential. It is balanced in such a way that it can it can heal an hurt with equal effectiveness. It is said that many years ago a young girl was tending sheep when she heard a a loud peal of thunder even though the sky was clear. 
Suddenly a strange object hit the ground at such an enourmous rate it left a small crater. Peering cautiously inside, the young shepherd was dazzled by a golden light. When the heavenly light subsided, at the bottom of the crater lay a golden harp. The local priest advised that it be kept in his temple, from which it was stolen within a week. Since then it has been rumoured to be in the hands of a private collector in sarlo, waiting to be reawoken in the hands of a master harpist
Crafted by The Lord Akwellne to aid those who favour music rather then a weapon
